sentences.sentence: They play hard, they play often, and they play to win.
sentences.translation: 他们训练刻苦，参赛频繁，而且目标就是取胜。
difficult_points: 三个并列分句反复使用 they play，形成强调澳大利亚运动员训练和比赛态度的排比。
to win 是目的不定式，说明 play 的目标不是参与，而是获胜。

sentences.sentence: Australian sports teams win more than their fair share of titles, demolishing rivals with seeming ease.
sentences.translation: 澳大利亚的运动队赢得的冠军数量超出了通常应得的份额，似乎轻而易举地击败对手。

structure.text: more than their fair share of titles

difficult_points: more than their fair share of titles 是夸张式表达，表示他们赢得的冠军多得不成比例。
demolishing rivals with seeming ease 是现在分词短语，补充说明他们取胜时击败对手的状态。

expressions.text: more than their fair share of

sentences.sentence: How do they do it?
sentences.translation: 他们是怎么做到的？
difficult_points: How 提问的是取得体育成功的方式，为后文解释原因作铺垫。
it 指代前一句中澳大利亚运动队频繁夺冠、轻松击败对手这一现象。

sentences.sentence: A big part of the secret is an extensive and expensive network of sporting academies underpinned by science and medicine.
sentences.translation: 其中很大一部分秘诀在于一个由科学和医学支撑的、覆盖面广且耗资巨大的体育学院网络。

structure.text: A big part of the secret
an extensive and expensive network of sporting academies underpinned by science and medicine

difficult_points: 主语是 A big part of the secret，说明后面的学院网络只是成功原因的一部分。
underpinned by science and medicine 是过去分词短语，修饰 network，表示该网络以科学和医学为支撑。

expressions.text: a big part of the secret

sentences.sentence: At the Australian Institute of Sport (AIS), hundreds of youngsters and pros live and train under the eyes of coaches.
sentences.translation: 在澳大利亚体育学院（AIS），数以百计的年轻运动员和职业运动员在教练的监督下生活和训练。

structure.text: At the Australian Institute of Sport (AIS)

difficult_points: At the Australian Institute of Sport (AIS) 是地点状语，先交代训练体系的核心机构。
under the eyes of coaches 是习惯表达，强调训练在教练持续观察和监督下进行。

sentences.sentence: Another body, the Australian Sports Commission (ASC), finances programmes of excellence in a total of 96 sports for thousands of sportsmen and women.
sentences.translation: 另一个机构——澳大利亚体育委员会（ASC）——为总共96个运动项目中的数千名男女运动员资助卓越项目。

structure.text: Another body, the Australian Sports Commission (ASC)
for thousands of sportsmen and women

difficult_points: the Australian Sports Commission (ASC) 是 Another body 的同位语，说明另一个机构的具体名称。
in a total of 96 sports 和 for thousands of sportsmen and women 分别说明项目覆盖的运动范围和受益对象。

sentences.sentence: Both provide intensive coaching, training facilities and nutritional advice.
sentences.translation: 这两个机构都提供高强度指导、训练设施和营养建议。

structure.text: intensive coaching, training facilities and nutritional advice

difficult_points: Both 指代前面提到的 AIS 和 ASC 两个机构。
provide 后面并列三个名词短语，概括这两个机构提供的支持类型。

sentences.sentence: Inside the academies, science takes centre stage.
sentences.translation: 在这些学院内部，科学占据核心位置。
difficult_points: Inside the academies 放在句首，强调讨论范围从外部体系转入学院内部。
takes centre stage 是比喻表达，意思是科学成为最重要、最受关注的因素。

expressions.meaning_zh: 占据核心位置；成为焦点

sentences.sentence: The AIS employs more than 100 sports scientists and doctors, and collaborates with scores of others in universities and research centres.
sentences.translation: AIS 雇用了100多名体育科学家和医生，并与大学和研究中心里的许多其他专家合作。

structure.text: employs more than 100 sports scientists and doctors
collaborates with scores of others in universities and research centres

difficult_points: employs 和 collaborates 是并列谓语，共用主语 The AIS。
scores of others 表示“许多其他人”，others 指其他科学家、医生或研究人员。

sentences.sentence: AIS scientists work across a number of sports, applying skills learned in one - such as building muscle strength in golfers - to others, such as swimming and squash.
sentences.translation: AIS 的科学家跨多个运动项目开展工作，把在一个项目中学到的技能——例如增强高尔夫球手的肌肉力量——应用到游泳、壁球等其他项目中。

structure.text: work across a number of sports
applying skills learned in one - such as building muscle strength in golfers - to others
such as building muscle strength in golfers

difficult_points: applying skills learned in one ... to others 是现在分词短语，说明科学家跨项目工作的具体方式。
one 和 others 分别指一个运动项目和其他运动项目，such as 后面的内容给出例子。

sentences.sentence: They are backed up by technicians who design instruments to collect data from athletes.
sentences.translation: 他们得到技术人员的支持，这些技术人员会设计仪器来收集运动员的数据。

structure.text: by technicians who design instruments to collect data from athletes
who design instruments to collect data from athletes

difficult_points: They 指代前一句的 AIS scientists，而不是运动员。
who 引导定语从句修饰 technicians，说明这些技术人员的职责。

sentences.sentence: They all focus on one aim: winning.
sentences.translation: 他们全都专注于一个目标：获胜。
difficult_points: They all 概括前文的科学家、医生和技术人员。
冒号后的 winning 对 one aim 进行解释，指出所有科研和技术工作的最终目标。

sentences.sentence: 'We can't waste our time looking at ethereal scientific questions that don't help the coach work with an athlete and improve performance,' says Peter Fricker, chief of science at AIS.
sentences.translation: AIS 科学主管 Peter Fricker 说：“我们不能把时间浪费在空泛的科学问题上，因为这些问题不能帮助教练与运动员合作并提升表现。”

structure.text: 'We can't waste our time looking at ethereal scientific questions that don't help the coach work with an athlete and improve performance,'
can't waste our time looking at ethereal scientific questions
that don't help the coach work with an athlete and improve performance

difficult_points: that 引导定语从句修饰 ethereal scientific questions，解释这些问题为什么不值得研究。
work with an athlete and improve performance 是并列动作，都是 help the coach 后的宾补结构的一部分。
chief of science at AIS 是 Peter Fricker 的同位语，说明其身份。

sentences.sentence: A lot of their work comes down to measurement - everything from the exact angle of a swimmer's dive to the second-by-second power output of a cyclist.
sentences.translation: 他们的许多工作归根结底都在于测量——从游泳运动员入水的精确角度，到自行车手逐秒输出的功率，几乎无所不包。

structure.text: everything from the exact angle of a swimmer's dive to the second-by-second power output of a cyclist
from the exact angle of a swimmer's dive to the second-by-second power output of a cyclist

difficult_points: comes down to 表示“归结为”，说明科研工作的核心是 measurement。
破折号后的 everything from ... to ... 对 measurement 的范围进行具体说明。

sentences.sentence: This data is used to wring improvements out of athletes.
sentences.translation: 这些数据被用来从运动员身上挖掘出表现提升的空间。

structure.text: to wring improvements out of athletes

difficult_points: This data 指代上一句提到的各种精确测量结果。
to wring improvements out of athletes 是目的不定式，wring out 带有“榨取、挤出”的比喻意味。

sentences.sentence: The focus is on individuals, tweaking performances to squeeze an extra hundredth of a second here, an extra millimetre there.
sentences.translation: 重点放在个体身上，通过微调表现，在这里挤出额外的百分之一秒，在那里多争取一毫米。

structure.text: tweaking performances to squeeze an extra hundredth of a second here, an extra millimetre there
to squeeze an extra hundredth of a second here, an extra millimetre there

difficult_points: tweaking performances 是现在分词短语，说明“关注个体”的具体做法。
here 和 there 与 two tiny gains 搭配，突出提升幅度虽小但很精细。

sentences.sentence: No gain is too slight to bother with.
sentences.translation: 任何提升都不会小到不值得关注。
difficult_points: No gain 是否定主语，表示“没有任何提升”。
too slight to bother with 是 too ... to ... 结构，意为“小到不值得费心”，全句否定后变成“再小也值得”。

sentences.sentence: It's the tiny, gradual improvements that add up to world-beating results.
sentences.translation: 正是这些微小而逐步的改进累积成了世界领先的成绩。

structure.text: that add up to world-beating results

difficult_points: It's ... that ... 是强调结构，强调真正带来结果的是微小、渐进的改进。
add up to 表示逐渐累积成某种结果，不是简单的数学相加。

sentences.sentence: To demonstrate how the system works, Bruce Mason at AIS shows off the prototype of a 3D analysis tool for studying swimmers.
sentences.translation: 为了展示这个系统如何运作，AIS 的 Bruce Mason 展示了一个用于研究游泳运动员的 3D 分析工具原型。

structure.text: To demonstrate how the system works
the prototype of a 3D analysis tool for studying swimmers

difficult_points: To demonstrate how the system works 是目的状语，说明展示原型的目的。
how the system works 是 embedded clause，作 demonstrate 的宾语。

sentences.sentence: A wire-frame model of a champion swimmer slices through the water, her arms moving in slow motion.
sentences.translation: 一个冠军游泳运动员的线框模型划过水面，她的手臂以慢动作移动。

structure.text: A wire-frame model of a champion swimmer
her arms moving in slow motion

difficult_points: her arms moving in slow motion 是独立主格结构，补充说明模型运动时手臂的状态。
slices through the water 用形象动词表现模型在水中前进的动作。

sentences.sentence: Looking side-on, Mason measures the distance between strokes.
sentences.translation: 从侧面观察时，Mason 测量每次划水之间的距离。
difficult_points: Looking side-on 是现在分词短语，表示观察角度，而不是句子的主干动作。
between strokes 修饰 distance，说明测量的是划水动作之间的间隔。

sentences.sentence: From above, he analyses how her spine swivels.
sentences.translation: 从上方观察时，他分析她的脊柱如何转动。
difficult_points: From above 与上一句的 Looking side-on 对应，表示从另一个角度进行分析。
how her spine swivels 是宾语从句，作 analyses 的宾语。

sentences.sentence: When fully developed, this system will enable him to build a biomechanical profile for coaches to use to help budding swimmers.
sentences.translation: 等这个系统完全开发出来后，它将使他能够建立一份生物力学档案，供教练用来帮助有潜力的游泳运动员。

structure.text: to build a biomechanical profile for coaches to use to help budding swimmers
for coaches to use to help budding swimmers

difficult_points: When fully developed 是省略结构，完整含义相当于 when this system is fully developed。
enable him to build 是 enable sb to do 结构，to build 说明系统使他能够完成的动作。
for coaches to use to help budding swimmers 说明档案的使用者和使用目的。

sentences.sentence: Mason's contribution to sport also includes the development of the SWAN (SWimming ANalysis) system now used in Australian national competitions.
sentences.translation: Mason 对体育的贡献还包括开发了 SWAN（游泳分析）系统，该系统如今用于澳大利亚全国比赛。

structure.text: the development of the SWAN (SWimming ANalysis) system now used in Australian national competitions
now used in Australian national competitions

difficult_points: also includes 表明 SWAN 系统是 Mason 对体育贡献的另一项内容。
now used in Australian national competitions 是过去分词短语，修饰 system，说明该系统当前的用途。

sentences.sentence: It collects images from digital cameras running at 50 frames a second and breaks down each part of a swimmer's performance into factors that can be analysed individually - stroke length, stroke frequency, average duration of each stroke, velocity, start, lap and finish times, and so on.
sentences.translation: 它从以每秒50帧运行的数码相机中收集图像，并把游泳运动员表现的每一部分分解成可以单独分析的因素——划水长度、划水频率、每次划水的平均持续时间、速度、出发、每圈和完赛时间等。

structure.text: collects images from digital cameras running at 50 frames a second
breaks down each part of a swimmer's performance into factors that can be analysed individually
stroke length, stroke frequency, average duration of each stroke, velocity, start, lap and finish times, and so on

difficult_points: collects 和 breaks down 是并列谓语，说明 SWAN 系统的两个连续功能。
running at 50 frames a second 修饰 digital cameras，说明相机拍摄速度。
that can be analysed individually 修饰 factors，说明这些因素可被单独分析。

sentences.sentence: At the end of each race, SWAN spits out data on each swimmer
sentences.translation: 每场比赛结束时，SWAN 会输出每名游泳运动员的数据。

structure.text: At the end of each race

difficult_points: At the end of each race 是时间状语，说明数据输出发生在比赛结束后。
spits out 是非正式动词短语，这里形象表示系统快速输出数据。

sentences.sentence: 'Take a look,' says Mason, pulling out a sheet of data.
sentences.translation: “看一下，”Mason 一边拿出一张数据表一边说。

structure.text: pulling out a sheet of data

difficult_points: pulling out a sheet of data 是现在分词短语，补充说明 Mason 说话时同时进行的动作。
direct speech 位于句首，后面的 says Mason 是倒装式转述结构。

sentences.sentence: He points out the data on the swimmers in second and third place, which shows that the one who finished third actually swam faster.
sentences.translation: 他指出第二名和第三名游泳选手的数据，而这些数据显示，第三名实际上游得更快。

structure.text: the data on the swimmers in second and third place
which shows that the one who finished third actually swam faster
that the one who finished third actually swam faster

difficult_points: which 引导非限制性定语从句，指代前面提到的数据，而不是 swimmers。
that 引导宾语从句作 shows 的宾语，说明数据显示出的具体内容。
who finished third 修饰 the one，指出“那个人”是第三名选手。

sentences.sentence: So why did he finish 35 hundredths of a second down?
sentences.translation: 那么，他为什么会落后百分之三十五秒完成比赛呢？

structure.text: finish 35 hundredths of a second down

difficult_points: So 承接上一句“第三名其实游得更快”的信息，引出疑问。
35 hundredths of a second down 表示落后 0.35 秒完成比赛，down 在这里表示比分或成绩上的落后。

sentences.sentence: 'His turn times were 44 hundredths of a second behind the other guy,' says Mason.
sentences.translation: Mason 说：“他的转身时间比另一个人慢了百分之四十四秒。”

structure.text: 'His turn times were 44 hundredths of a second behind the other guy,'
44 hundredths of a second behind the other guy

difficult_points: turn times 指游泳比赛中转身环节所花的时间。
behind the other guy 表示成绩慢于另一个选手，而不是空间位置在后面。

sentences.sentence: 'If he can improve on his turns, he can do much better.'
sentences.translation: “如果他能改进自己的转身，他就能表现得好得多。”

structure.text: 'If he can improve on his turns, he can do much better.'
If he can improve on his turns

difficult_points: If 引导条件状语从句，说明成绩提升的前提是改善转身。
do much better 中 do 指代比赛表现，much 强化 better 的程度。

sentences.sentence: This is the kind of accuracy that AIS scientists' research is bringing to a range of sports.
sentences.translation: 这正是 AIS 科学家的研究正在带给众多运动项目的那种精确性。

structure.text: that AIS scientists' research is bringing to a range of sports

difficult_points: This 指代前面通过转身时间解释比赛结果的精确分析。
that 引导定语从句修饰 accuracy，说明这种精确性正被应用到多种运动中。

sentences.sentence: With the Cooperative Research Centre for Micro Technology in Melbourne, they are developing unobtrusive sensors that will be embedded in an athlete's clothes or running shoes to monitor heart rate, sweating, heat production or any other factor that might have an impact on an athlete's ability to run.
sentences.translation: 他们正与墨尔本微技术合作研究中心合作，开发不显眼的传感器，这些传感器将被嵌入运动员的衣服或跑鞋中，用来监测心率、出汗、产热，或其他任何可能影响运动员跑步能力的因素。

structure.text: With the Cooperative Research Centre for Micro Technology in Melbourne

unobtrusive sensors that will be embedded in an athlete's clothes or running shoes to monitor heart rate, sweating, heat production or any other factor that might have an impact on an athlete's ability to run
that will be embedded in an athlete's clothes or running shoes to monitor heart rate, sweating, heat production or any other factor that might have an impact on an athlete's ability to run
to monitor heart rate, sweating, heat production or any other factor that might have an impact on an athlete's ability to run
that might have an impact on an athlete's ability to run

difficult_points: With ... in Melbourne 表示合作对象，而不是传感器所在的位置。
that will be embedded ... 修饰 sensors，说明传感器将被放置在哪里。
第二个 that 修饰 any other factor，说明这些因素可能影响运动员跑步能力。

sentences.sentence: There's more to it than simply measuring performance.
sentences.translation: 这件事并不只是简单地测量表现。
difficult_points: There's more to it than ... 表示事情比后面所说的内容更复杂。
it 指代 AIS 科学研究和数据应用这件事，而不是某个单一仪器。

sentences.sentence: Fricker gives the example of athletes who may be down with coughs and colds 11 or 12 times a year.
sentences.translation: Fricker 举了一个例子：有些运动员一年可能会因咳嗽和感冒病倒11或12次。

structure.text: the example of athletes who may be down with coughs and colds 11 or 12 times a year
who may be down with coughs and colds 11 or 12 times a year

difficult_points: who 引导定语从句修饰 athletes，说明这些运动员的健康问题。
be down with coughs and colds 表示因咳嗽和感冒而病倒或无法正常训练。

sentences.sentence: After years of experimentation, AIS and the University of Newcastle in New South Wales developed a test that measures how much of the immune-system protein immunoglobulin A is present in athletes' saliva.
sentences.translation: 经过多年的实验，AIS 和新南威尔士州的纽卡斯尔大学开发出一种测试，用来测量运动员唾液中免疫系统蛋白免疫球蛋白 A 的含量。

structure.text: AIS and the University of Newcastle in New South Wales
a test that measures how much of the immune-system protein immunoglobulin A is present in athletes' saliva
that measures how much of the immune-system protein immunoglobulin A is present in athletes' saliva
how much of the immune-system protein immunoglobulin A is present in athletes' saliva

difficult_points: After years of experimentation 强调这项测试是在长期实验后形成的。
that 引导定语从句修饰 a test，说明测试的功能。
how much ... is present 是嵌套宾语从句，表示测量 IgA 在唾液中的含量。

sentences.sentence: If IgA levels suddenly fall below a certain level, training is eased or dropped altogether.
sentences.translation: 如果 IgA 水平突然降到某一水平以下，训练就会被减轻，或完全停止。

structure.text: If IgA levels suddenly fall below a certain level

difficult_points: If 引导条件状语从句，说明调整训练的触发条件。
is eased or dropped 是被动结构，表示训练安排被减轻或取消。
altogether 修饰 dropped，表示训练可能被完全停止。

sentences.sentence: Soon, IgA levels start rising again, and the danger passes.
sentences.translation: 很快，IgA 水平又开始上升，危险也就过去了。
difficult_points: start rising again 表示 IgA 水平恢复上升，again 强调回到正常趋势。
the danger 指前文因免疫指标下降而带来的生病风险。

sentences.sentence: Since the tests were introduced, AIS athletes in all sports have been remarkably successful at staying healthy.
sentences.translation: 自从这些测试被引入以来，AIS 各个项目的运动员在保持健康方面都非常成功。
difficult_points: Since 引导时间状语从句，配合主句现在完成时，表示从测试引入至今的结果。
at staying healthy 说明 successful 的具体方面，即保持健康。

expressions.meaning_zh: 自从这些测试被引入以来

sentences.sentence: Using data is a complex business.
sentences.translation: 使用数据是一件复杂的事。
difficult_points: Using data 是动名词短语作主语，而不是现在分词作状语。
a complex business 中 business 指“事情、任务”，不是商业活动。

sentences.sentence: Well before a championship, sports scientists and coaches start to prepare the athlete by developing a 'competition model', based on what they expect will be the winning times.
sentences.translation: 早在锦标赛开始前很久，体育科学家和教练就会通过制定一个“比赛模型”来帮助运动员备赛，这个模型基于他们预期的夺冠成绩。

structure.text: based on what they expect will be the winning times
what they expect will be the winning times

difficult_points: Well before a championship 表示时间远早于比赛开始，well 强化 before。
by developing a 'competition model' 说明 prepare the athlete 的方式。
based on what they expect will be the winning times 是过去分词短语，修饰 competition model。

sentences.sentence: 'You design the model to make that time,' says Mason.
sentences.translation: Mason 说：“你设计这个模型，就是为了达到那个时间。”

structure.text: 'You design the model to make that time,'

difficult_points: to make that time 是目的不定式，表示设计模型的目标。
that time 指上一句中的 winning times，即预计夺冠所需的成绩时间。

sentences.sentence: 'A start of this much, each free-swimming period has to be this fast, with a certain stroke frequency and stroke length, with turns done in these times.'
sentences.translation: “出发阶段要达到这样的水平，每段自由游的速度必须这么快，并配合一定的划水频率和划水长度，转身也要在这些时间内完成。”

structure.text: 'A start of this much, each free-swimming period has to be this fast, with a certain stroke frequency and stroke length, with turns done in these times.'
with a certain stroke frequency and stroke length
with turns done in these times

difficult_points: 这句话是口语化的模型说明，A start of this much 是省略式片段，指起跑阶段要达到的指标。
with a certain stroke frequency and stroke length 补充说明速度目标还包含划水频率和划水长度。
with turns done in these times 是 with 复合结构，说明转身也有时间目标。

sentences.sentence: All the training is then geared towards making the athlete hit those targets, both overall and for each segment of the race.
sentences.translation: 随后，所有训练都会围绕让运动员达到这些目标来安排，既包括整体目标，也包括比赛每个阶段的目标。

structure.text: making the athlete hit those targets
both overall and for each segment of the race

difficult_points: is then geared towards 表示训练被调整为服务某个目标，是被动结构。
making the athlete hit those targets 是 towards 后的动名词结构，说明训练导向。
both overall and for each segment of the race 指目标既有整体成绩，也有每段比赛的指标。

sentences.sentence: Techniques like these have transformed Australia into arguably the world's most successful sporting nation.
sentences.translation: 正是这类技术把澳大利亚变成了可以说是世界上最成功的体育强国。

structure.text: into arguably the world's most successful sporting nation

difficult_points: have transformed 是现在完成时，强调这些技术对澳大利亚体育地位造成的持续影响。
arguably 表示“可以说”，让世界最成功这一判断稍微缓和，不是绝对断言。

sentences.sentence: Of course, there's nothing to stop other countries copying - and many have tried.
sentences.translation: 当然，没有什么能阻止其他国家仿效——而且许多国家已经尝试过。
difficult_points: there's nothing to stop ... 表示“没有什么能阻止……”，用于承认其他国家可以模仿。
many have tried 中 have tried 省略了 copying Australia 的含义，承接前半句。

sentences.sentence: Some years ago, the AIS unveiled coolant-lined jackets for endurance athletes.
sentences.translation: 几年前，AIS 推出了供耐力项目运动员使用的带冷却内衬的夹克。
difficult_points: unveiled 表示首次推出或公开展示，常用于新产品、新方案发布。
coolant-lined jackets 中 coolant-lined 是复合形容词，说明夹克内有冷却材料或冷却层。

sentences.sentence: At the Atlanta Olympic Games in 1996, these sliced as much as two per cent off cyclists' and rowers' times.
sentences.translation: 在1996年亚特兰大奥运会上，这些夹克把自行车运动员和赛艇运动员的成绩时间最多缩短了百分之二。

structure.text: At the Atlanta Olympic Games in 1996
as much as two per cent off cyclists' and rowers' times

difficult_points: these 指代上一句的 coolant-lined jackets。
sliced ... off ... times 表示把成绩时间减少了，而不是切割实物。
as much as two per cent 强调最高可达到百分之二的减少幅度。

sentences.sentence: Now everyone uses them.
sentences.translation: 现在所有人都在使用它们。
difficult_points: them 指代前面提到的 coolant-lined jackets。
everyone 是概括性说法，强调这项技术已经广泛扩散。

sentences.sentence: The same has happened to the 'altitude tent', developed by AIS to replicate the effect of altitude training at sea level.
sentences.translation: “高原帐篷”也发生了同样的情况；它由 AIS 开发，用来在海平面高度复制高原训练的效果。

structure.text: developed by AIS to replicate the effect of altitude training at sea level
to replicate the effect of altitude training at sea level

difficult_points: The same 指前文“被其他人复制并广泛使用”的情况。
developed by AIS 是过去分词短语，修饰 altitude tent。
to replicate the effect of altitude training at sea level 说明高原帐篷的设计目的。

expressions.meaning_zh: 同样的情况也发生在……身上

sentences.sentence: But Australia's success story is about more than easily copied technological fixes, and up to now no nation has replicated its all-encompassing system.
sentences.translation: 但澳大利亚的成功故事并不只是那些容易复制的技术解决方案；到目前为止，还没有任何国家复制其全方位的体系。

structure.text: about more than easily copied technological fixes
and up to now no nation has replicated its all-encompassing system

difficult_points: But 标志转折：前文承认某些技术可被复制，本句强调真正成功不止于技术。
more than easily copied technological fixes 表示成功原因超过容易模仿的单项技术方案。
its all-encompassing system 指澳大利亚包含科研、训练、设施、营养和管理在内的整体体系。
